endpoints.name: GET /data/ga
endpoints.description: Returns Analytics data for a view (profile).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /data/mcf
endpoints.description: Returns Analytics Multi-Channel Funnels data for a view (profile).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /data/realtime
endpoints.description: Returns real time data for a view (profile).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /management/accountSummaries
endpoints.description: Lists account summaries (lightweight tree comprised of accounts/properties/profiles) to which the user has access.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /management/accounts
endpoints.description: Lists all accounts to which the user has access.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /management/accounts/{accountId}/entityUserLinks
endpoints.description: Lists account-user links for a given account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: POST /management/accounts/{accountId}/entityUserLinks
endpoints.description: Adds a new user to the given account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: PUT /management/accounts/{accountId}/entityUserLinks/{linkId}
endpoints.description: Updates permissions for an existing user on the given account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LINKID}} with a real linkid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /management/accounts/{accountId}/entityUserLinks/{linkId}
endpoints.description: Removes a user from the given account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LINKID}} with a real linkid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /management/accounts/{accountId}/filters
endpoints.description: Lists all filters for an account
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: POST /management/accounts/{accountId}/filters
endpoints.description: Create a new filter.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /management/accounts/{accountId}/filters/{filterId}
endpoints.description: Returns filters to which the user has access.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILTERID}} with a real filterid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: PUT /management/accounts/{accountId}/filters/{filterId}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing filter.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILTERID}} with a real filterid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /management/accounts/{accountId}/filters/{filterId}
endpoints.description: Delete a filter.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILTERID}} with a real filterid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.description: Updates an existing filter. This method supports patch semantics.

endpoints.name: GET /management/accounts/{accountId}/webproperties/{webPropertyId}/profiles/{profileId}/unsampledReports/{unsampledReportId}
endpoints.description: Returns a single unsampled report.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{UNSAMPLEDREPORTID}} with a real unsampledreportid. Replace {{PROFILEID}} with a real profileid. Replace {{WEBPROPERTYID}} with a real webpropertyid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /management/accounts/{accountId}/webproperties/{webPropertyId}/profiles/{profileId}/unsampledReports/{unsampledReportId}
endpoints.description: Deletes an unsampled report.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{UNSAMPLEDREPORTID}} with a real unsampledreportid. Replace {{PROFILEID}} with a real profileid. Replace {{WEBPROPERTYID}} with a real webpropertyid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.description: Updates an existing remarketing audience. This method supports patch semantics.
